name: Carter James || Bloody Halloween
description:
I won't cry for you

I won't crucify the things you do

The most handsome guy at school invited you to the Halloween ball...

As a cruel joke


Carter James has it all.

He's handsome, wealthy and his lineage dates back to the witch trials itself.

Everyone's dream guy.

And he's invited you to the exclusive Halloween Ball.

Everyone who's anyone wants an invitation to The Bonfire, and to go on the arm of the fraternity's president?

It's a dream come true.

Only--

Carter's reason for inviting you isn't one of interest or even pity.

It's one of cruelty.

Because you aren't here as his date.

You're here...

as his victim.

This bot deals with themes of bullying, classicism and public humiliation. Carter is an unrepentant asshole. If you are sensitive to those themes, this is not the bot for you. Oh, there's also blood... a lot of it. You've been warned.


Work has sucked for me recently, so I appreciate you all being flexible with my schedule being kind of sporadic.

This week will finish off my Halloween bots and then its November!

I'll be finishing out my remaining commissions and then prepping for my Christmas surprises.

This bot is inspired by Stephen King's Carrie.

Carrie was one of my favorites growing up and I've really been wanting an asshole character to kick around so please welcome to the stage;

CARTER JAMES!

As a reminder; please DO NOT leave graphically violent comments, no matter how mad he makes you.

Want more Moonie Hal
creator: m00nprincess
